prompt: A vertical whimsical spring calendar illustration in a soft pastel anime storybook style, designed like a cute phone wallpaper for May. The scene is a warm sun-dappled garden with creamy golden bokeh light, a narrow stone path, clover patches, tiny white daisies, ferns, and a few small ripe strawberries near the bottom right. Large fresh green maple leaves hang from the upper left, and cascading clusters of pale purple wisteria frame the left and right edges. Near the top right, place elegant hand-lettered script reading May with small lily-of-the-valley doodles integrated into the lettering, a tiny swallow silhouette above, and the smaller text “5月” beneath it. Below that, add a clean mini calendar for May with the weekday row “S M T W T F S” and dates 1 through 31 arranged in a simple grid, using soft brown-gray text. Scatter tiny decorative hearts, dots, sparkles, and simple floral doodles around the calendar area. In the lower half, show a chibi child character standing on the path in a penguin kigurumi onesie with a dark charcoal body, white belly, yellow beak hood, and little yellow feet. The character has a short ash brown bob peeking out from the hood, two silver hairpins on one side, and a large metal zipper ring pull at the neck. Replace the face with a smooth centered rectangular blur block as a privacy censor, keeping the rest of the head and hair visible. The character holds a bouquet of white lily-of-the-valley flowers in one hand and extends the other arm outward as if enjoying the breeze. Add pink flower petals drifting nearby, a red ladybug resting on a green leaf above the character, several floating maple seeds with dotted spiral motion trails, delicate white swirl lines suggesting wind around the character, and a few extra lily-of-the-valley sprigs around the composition. Use a soft cream, sage green, lavender, and warm beige palette, gentle linework, subtle shading, and a dreamy cute seasonal mood.
